mapper.select:
SELECT x, zone_code, SUM(y) as y FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts,'%Y-%m-%d') DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts,'%Y-%m') DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts,'%Y') AS x , ti.zone_code, ROUND(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE,2) AS y FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rdh, TB_TAGINFO ti, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti where ti.tagname = rdh.tagname AND pti.PWI_TAG = ti.tagname AND ti.USE_YN = '1' and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and ti.USE_YN ='1'
AND rdh.ts >=concat(#{start_date},' 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(#{end_date},' 23:59:00')
AND rdh.ts >=concat(#{start_date},'-01 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(#{end_date},'-31 23:59:00')
AND rdh.ts >=concat(#{start_date},'-01-01 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(#{end_date},'-12-31 23:59:00')
) a GROUP BY x date(x) month(x) x, zone_code
ORDER BY zone_code, x

SELECT zone_code, ROUND(SUM(Y), 2) y FROM ( SELECT ti.FAC_CODE, ti.zone_code, SUM(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE) AS y FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_TAGINFO ti, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti where ti.tagname = rdh.tagname AND pti.PWQ_TAG = ti.tagname AND ti.USE_YN = '1' and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and ti.USE_YN ='1' and rdh.VALUE != 0
AND rdh.ts >=concat(#{start_date},' 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(#{end_date},' 23:59:00')
AND rdh.ts >=concat(#{start_date},'-01 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(#{end_date},'-31 23:59:00')
AND rdh.ts >=concat(#{start_date},'-01-01 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(#{end_date},'-12-31 23:59:00')
GROUP BY FAC_CODE ) a GROUP BY zone_code

SELECT ROUND(SUM(rdh.VALUE * pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE ),2) as all_pwq FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE pti.IS_ALL = '1' and pti.mntr_yn = '1'
and rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG
AND rdh.ts >=concat(#{start_date},' 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(#{end_date},' 23:59:00')
AND rdh.ts >=concat(#{start_date},'-01 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(#{end_date},'-31 23:59:00')
AND rdh.ts >=concat(#{start_date},'-01-01 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(#{end_date},'-12-31 23:59:00')

SELECT x, SUM(y) as y, zone_name FROM (select DATE_FORMAT(rd.ts, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS x, ti.zone_code, zn.zone_name, ti.tagname, ROUND(rd.VALUE*pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE,2) AS y from TB_RAWDATA rd, TB_TAGINFO ti, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti, TB_ZONE zn where rd.ts = (SELECT MAX(TS) FROM TB_RAWDATA WHERE TS > DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -15 MINUTE) AND TS <= NOW()) AND rd.tagname = ti.tagname and pti.PWI_TAG = ti.tagname AND ti.zone_code = zn.zone_code and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and ti.USE_YN ='1' GROUP BY ti.tagname) a GROUP BY zone_name

SELECT x, fac_name, fac_code, tagname, COALESCE(AVG(y), 0) as y FROM (
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts,'%Y-%m-%d %H') DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts,'%Y-%m-%d') DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts,'%Y-%m') DATE_FORMAT(rdh.ts,'%Y') AS x, fc.fac_name, fc.fac_code, ti.tagname, ROUND(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE,2) AS y FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_TAGINFO ti, TB_FAC fc, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = ti.tagname AND ti.fac_code = fc.FAC_CODE AND pti.PWQ_TAG = ti.tagname AND ti.USE_YN = '1' and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and ti.USE_YN ='1' and
rdh.ts >=concat(#{start_date},' 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(#{end_date},' 23:59:00')
rdh.ts >=concat(#{start_date},'-01 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(#{end_date},'-31 23:59:00')
rdh.ts >=concat(#{start_date},'-01-01 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(#{end_date},'-12-31 23:59:00')
and ti.zone_code = #{zone_code} and fc.fac_code = #{fac_code} ) a GROUP BY fac_name, x date(x) x x

SELECT fac_name, fac_code, CASE WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN y != 0 THEN 1 END) > 0 THEN ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN y != 0 THEN y END), 2) ELSE 0 END AS y FROM ( SELECT fc.FAC_NAME, fc.FAC_CODE, rdh.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE AS y FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_TAGINFO ti, TB_FAC fc, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = ti.tagname and ti.fac_code = fc.FAC_CODE AND pti.PWQ_TAG = ti.tagname AND ti.USE_YN = '1' and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and ti.USE_YN ='1' and
rdh.ts >=concat(#{start_date},' 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(#{end_date},' 23:59:00')
rdh.ts >=concat(#{start_date},'-01 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(#{end_date},'-31 23:59:00')
rdh.ts >=concat(#{start_date},'-01-01 00:00:00') AND rdh.ts <= concat(#{end_date},'-12-31 23:59:00')
and ti.zone_code = #{zone_code} and fc.fac_code = #{fac_code} ) a GROUP BY fac_name

SELECT a.*, ( SELECT CONCAT(PUMP_GRP_NM, PUMP_GRP_IDX) FROM TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF WHERE PMB_TAG PRI_D_TAG PWI_TAG SPI_TAG = tagname LIMIT 1 ) name FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(b.ts,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') DATE_FORMAT(b.ts,'%Y-%m-%d') DATE_FORMAT(b.ts,'%Y-%m') DATE_FORMAT(b.ts,'%Y') ts, b.tagname,
ROUND(b.value * c.PWI_UNIT_VALUE, 2) as value
b.value as value
FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR b
, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF c
WHERE
b.ts >= CONCAT(#{start_date}, ' 00:00:00') AND b.ts <= CONCAT(#{end_date}, ' 23:59:00')
b.ts >= CONCAT(#{start_date}, '-01 00:00:00') AND b.ts <= CONCAT(#{end_date}, '-31 23:59:00')
b.ts >= CONCAT(#{start_date}, '-01-01 00:00:00') AND b.ts <= CONCAT(#{end_date}, '-12-31 23:59:00')
AND b.tagname IN ( SELECT PMB_TAG PWI_TAG PRI_D_TAG SPI_TAG FROM TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF )
AND b.tagname = c.PWI_TAG
GROUP BY b.ts DATE(b.ts) MONTH(b.ts) YEAR(b.ts), b.tagname ) a;

SELECT a.*, '정읍가압장 펌프' as name FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(ts,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') DATE_FORMAT(ts,'%Y-%m-%d') DATE_FORMAT(ts,'%Y-%m') DATE_FORMAT(ts,'%Y') ts, tagname, value FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR b WHERE
ts >=concat(#{start_date},' 00:00:00') AND ts <= concat(#{end_date},' 23:59:00')
ts >=concat(#{start_date},'-01 00:00:00') AND ts <= concat(#{end_date},'-31 23:59:00')
ts >=concat(#{start_date},'-01-01 00:00:00') AND ts <= concat(#{end_date},'-12-31 23:59:00')
AND tagname IN (SELECT PWI_TAG FROM TB_CTR_PRF_PUMPMST_INF) a group by b.ts date(b.ts) month(b.ts) year(b.ts),b.tagname )

SELECT fc.fac_code, fc.fac_name, fc.DSC as DCS, ti.tagname FROM TB_TAGINFO ti , TB_FAC fc, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF tpti where ti.fac_code = fc.FAC_CODE AND ti.USE_YN = '1' AND fc.USE_YN = '1' AND tpti.MNTR_YN = '1' AND ti.TAGNAME = tpti.PWQ_TAG AND ti.zone_code = #{zone_code} GROUP BY ti.fac_code

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(rdm.ts,'%Y-%m-%d %H') DATE_FORMAT(rdm.ts,'%Y-%m-%d') DATE_FORMAT(rdm.ts,'%Y-%m') DATE_FORMAT(rdm.ts,'%Y') AS x, ti.zone_code, fc.fac_name, rdm.tagname, fc.FAC_CODE, fc.DSC as DCS, pti.PWI_UNIT, ROUND(AVG(rdm.VALUE * pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE), 2) AS y FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR rdm, TB_TAGINFO ti, TB_FAC fc, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdm.tagname = ti.tagname AND ti.fac_code = fc.FAC_CODE AND rdm.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG AND ti.USE_YN = '1' AND pti.mntr_yn = '1'
AND rdm.ts >=concat(#{start_date},' 00:00:00') AND rdm.ts <= concat(#{end_date},' 23:59:00')
AND rdm.ts >=concat(#{start_date},'-01 00:00:00') AND rdm.ts <= concat(#{end_date},'-31 23:59:00')
AND rdm.ts >=concat(#{start_date},'-01-01 00:00:00') AND rdm.ts <= concat(#{end_date},'-12-31 23:59:00')
AND ti.zone_code = #{zone_code} GROUP BY x, ti.zone_code, fc.fac_name, rdm.tagname, fc.FAC_CODE, fc.DSC, pti.PWI_UNIT ORDER BY fc.fac_name, x

SELECT COALESCE(ROUND( SUM(rd.VALUE) *pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE,2),0) 'nowPwi', DATE_FORMAT(ts,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS ts FROM TB_RAWDATA rd, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rd.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and pti.is_all = '1' AND rd.ts >= DATE_SUB(now(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR) AND rd.ts <= now() GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(ts,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') ORDER BY TS DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROUND(sum(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE),2) AS todayPwr FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and pti.IS_ALL ='1' and DATE(rdh.ts) = DATE(CURDATE()) ) todayPwr, ( SELECT ROUND(sum(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE),2) AS afterPwr FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and pti.IS_ALL ='1' and DATE(rdh.ts) = DATE(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 1 DAY) ) afterPwr, ( SELECT ROUND(sum(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE),2) AS monthPwr FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG and pti.IS_ALL ='1' and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and DATE(ts) BETWEEN DATE(LAST_DAY(NOW() - INTERVAL 1 MONTH) + INTERVAL 1 DAY) and LAST_DAY(NOW()) ) monthPwr, ( SELECT ROUND(sum(rdh.VALUE*pti.PWQ_UNIT_VALUE),2) AS yearPwr FROM TB_RAWDATA_HOUR_INGRT rdh, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rdh.tagname = pti.PWQ_TAG and pti.IS_ALL ='1' and pti.mntr_yn = '1' and DATE(ts) BETWEEN DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(NOW()), '-01-01')) and DATE(CONCAT(YEAR(NOW()), '-12-31')) ) yearPwr

SELECT date, TYPE, COALESCE(ROUND(savingCost,2),0) as savingCost, COALESCE(ROUND(savingKwh,2), 0) as savingKwh, COALESCE(ROUND(savingCo2,2), 0) as savingCo2 FROM TB_RST_SAVINGS_TARGET WHERE date >= LAST_DAY(NOW() - interval 1 month) AND date <= LAST_DAY(NOW()) ORDER BY date

SELECT substring(date,1,4) as date, TYPE, REPLACE(format(sum(savingCost),0),',','') AS savingCost, REPLACE(format(sum(savingKwh),0),',','') AS savingKwh, REPLACE(format(sum(savingCo2),0),',','') AS savingCo2 FROM TB_RST_SAVINGS_TARGET GROUP BY SUBSTRING(date,1,4) ORDER BY date
SELECT MNTH, STN_TM, RATE_IDX, SSN, TIMEZONE, FORMAT (BASE_RATE,0) BASE_RATE, ELCTR_RATE FROM TB_RT_RATE_INF WHERE RATE_IDX IN (1,2,3)

select ti.zone_code, fc.FAC_NAME, DATE_FORMAT(rd.ts,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') AS ts, COALESCE(ROUND(rd.value*pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE, 2), 0) AS 'kWVALUE' FROM TB_RAWDATA rd, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti, TB_TAGINFO ti, TB_FAC fc WHERE rd.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG AND ti.fac_code = fc.FAC_CODE AND ti.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG and pti.mntr_yn = '1' AND ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE AND ts <= NOW() AND fc.USE_YN='1' GROUP BY fc.FAC_NAME ORDER BY kWVALUE+0 DESC LIMIT 6

select DATE_FORMAT(rd.ts,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:00') AS ts, COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(rd.value)*pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE, 2), 0) AS 'kWVALUE' FROM TB_RAWDATA rd, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rd.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG AND pti.MNTR_YN ='1' AND pti.IS_ALL='1' and rd.value != 0 AND ts >= (NOW() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE) AND ts <= NOW() GROUP by rd.ts ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
